best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-home-001 title: user navigates to settings from homepage module: homepage source pages: 1 preconditions: user is on the homepage. test data: test steps: 1. tap on "impostazioni". 2. verify that the "impostazioni" page opens. expected result: the "impostazioni" page should open successfully.

test case id: tc-home-002 title: user views a new location from homepage module: homepage source pages: 1 preconditions: user is on the homepage. test data: test steps: 1. tap on "visualizzazione nuovo luogo". 2. verify that the "pathfinder" page opens. expected result: the "pathfinder" page should open successfully.

best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-pathfinder-005 title: user navigates to homepage without clicking "indietro" module: apertura pagina pathfinder source pages: 3 preconditions: user is on the "apertura pagina pathfinder" page. test data: test steps: 1. tap on "indietro" (not clicked). 2. verify that the question is displayed. 3. tap on "ritorno ad homepage". 4. verify that the user returns to the "apertura pagina pathfinder" page. expected result: the question should be displayed, and the user should return to the "apertura pagina pathfinder" page.
